name: Geometri Berani
signature: Solid color blocks slide sharply away to unveil each section (no soft fade), oversized bleeding type anchors the hero like a magazine spread, hard-edge geometric shapes (squares, triangles, rings) parallax behind every section with deliberate rather than ambient motion, and slanted color bars replace straight rule lines between sections.
brief: For couples who explicitly do not want anything floral or ceremonial — bold contrasting color blocking, confident asymmetric energy, editorial rather than ornamental. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
